options.text: the place that is nowhere (ou-topos, coined by More in 1516)
the perfect place
the city of the future

exercises.explanation: Nowhere — the word confesses its own impossibility. The question mark was built in from 1516.

exercises.prompt: Compare any two utopias on which three axes?

options.text: le travail, la propriété, la décision
the climate, the cuisine, the flag
size, age, location

exercises.explanation: Work, property, decision — every model society answers all three, openly or not.

exercises.template: À la coopérative, un membre vaut une {{b1}}.
exercises.explanation: Une voix — one vote. Capital doesn't outvote people; that's the whole thesis.

exercises.prompt: A utopia that locked the exits.
exercises.template: La {{b1}} est une utopie qui a fermé les sorties.
exercises.explanation: Une dystopie — judge any perfect society by the room it leaves for dissent.

exercises.prompt: In a réflexion personnelle, definitions are…

options.text: your opening move — distinguish bonheur, bien-être, épanouissement first
your conclusion
unnecessary at C2

exercises.explanation: Define first, argue after: a state, an indicator, a process — three different debates.

exercises.prompt: What microcredit bets about the poor (adjective).
exercises.template: Le microcrédit parie que les pauvres sont {{b1}}.
exercises.explanation: Solvables — creditworthy. A tiny loan carrying a large thesis about trust.

exercises.prompt: Match each term to its meaning.
Put the words in order: "An ideal serves as a heading, not an address."
Listen to this conclusion of a réflexion personnelle. Which moves does it chain?
exercises.transcript: Je tranche : la société ne peut pas fournir le bonheur — elle peut seulement cesser de l'empêcher. Reste une question : qui décidera de ce qui l'empêche ?

options.text: Trancher puis ouvrir — a verdict, then one last door
Refusing to answer the question
Summarising both sides without choosing

exercises.explanation: The conclusion you've trained since B2: commit, then open. The DALF rewards the courage AND the door.

exercises.prompt: Read this comparison of two model communities and answer both questions.
exercises.passageFr: Le village A a mis la propriété en commun ; le village B l'a gardée privée mais a plafonné les écarts. Au travail, A décrète l'égalité des tâches ; B laisse chacun choisir, et constate que personne ne choisit la plomberie. À la décision, A vote tout en assemblée, jusqu'à la couleur des volets ; B élit un conseil et s'en plaint, ce qui est aussi une institution. Aucun des deux n'a résolu la troisième question — celle qu'on pose toujours trop tard : que fait-on de celui qui veut partir ? A l'appelle un traître. B lui paie le car. C'est, à ce jour, la différence la plus instructive.
exercises.passageEn: Village A pooled property; village B kept it private but capped the gaps. At work, A decrees equal chores; B lets everyone choose, and observes that nobody chooses plumbing. For decisions, A votes everything in assembly, down to the colour of the shutters; B elects a council and complains about it, which is also an institution. Neither has solved the third question — the one always asked too late: what do you do with the person who wants to leave? A calls him a traitor. B pays for his bus. That is, to date, the most instructive difference.

questions.prompt: On which axis does the passage find the decisive difference?

options.text: The treatment of dissent — the one who wants to leave
The colour of the shutters
The price of property

questions.prompt: « Personne ne choisit la plomberie » quietly objects that…

options.text: free choice of work leaves necessary tasks undone — utopias must answer for the pipes
plumbing is forbidden in village B
everyone in A is a plumber

exercises.prompt: The full C2 réflexion machine, in order:

options.text: définir → confronter (thèse/antithèse) → illustrer (chiffres à l'appui) → trancher puis ouvrir
illustrer → trancher → définir → confronter
trancher d'abord, définir si le temps le permet

exercises.explanation: Everything converges here: definitions, your dissertation training, your project defenses, and the conclusion that commits. Fin du programme — la suite vous appartient.

exercises.prompt: Listen, then choose what it means.
exercises.transcript: L'utopie indique l'écart entre la société qu'on a et celle qu'on n'ose pas demander.

options.text: Utopia measures the gap between the society we have and the one we dare not ask for.
Every utopia answers three questions: work, property, decision.
A perfect society with no exit is a different genre of book.
a utopia
alter-globalism
microcredit

exercises.prompt: Fill in the missing word (from this unit's vocabulary).
exercises.template: Le {{b1}} parie que les pauvres sont solvables.
exercises.explanation: « Le microcrédit parie que les pauvres sont solvables. » — microcredit.

exercises.prompt: Match each word to its English meaning.
Speaking practice — listen, then say the sentence aloud and record yourself:
exercises.targetFr: L'utopie indique l'écart entre la société qu'on a et celle qu'on n'ose pas demander.
exercises.targetEn: Utopia measures the gap between the society we have and the one we dare not ask for.

exercises.prompt: Speaking practice — say this sentence aloud and record yourself:
exercises.targetFr: Une société parfaite sans porte de sortie est un autre genre de livre.
exercises.targetEn: A perfect society with no exit is a different genre of book.
